verses.1: As the deer pants for the water brooks,
verses.2: My soul thirsts for God, for the living God.
verses.3: My tears have been my food day and night,
verses.4: These things I remember, and pour out my soul within me,
verses.5: Why are you in despair, my soul?
verses.6: My God, my soul is in despair within me.
verses.7: Deep calls to deep at the noise of your waterfalls.
verses.8: The LORD will command his loving kindness in the daytime.
verses.9: I will ask God, my rock, “Why have you forgotten me?
verses.10: As with a sword in my bones, my adversaries reproach me,
verses.11: Why are you in despair, my soul?
